default_strike.text:
Demon with 4 life. 3 strength, 0 bleed.
Abyssal Hunter can inflict 1 damage on any minion as a (D) action. During your unlock phase, Abyssal Hunter inflicts 1 damage on a ready vampire you control. Burn Abyssal Hunter if any ranged aggravated damage is inflicted on it (even if prevented).
